rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for interface assumptions/guarantees and implementation scopes for bindings.
Use assign only for implementation-level output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must reside in valid AADL scopes: type annexes for behavioral contracts, implementation annexes for bindings.
Do not reference implementation-only subcomponents or ports in component type annexes.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE annexes are visible in the current AADL scope.
Do not introduce package-qualified names or types not present in the analyzed model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level guarantees must reference valid output features or auxiliary variables.
Component type contracts should relate visible inputs to visible outputs.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports or features not visible at the component type level.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
